odd_one_out.why: Titan is a moon (of Saturn); the rest are planets.
Excel is an application; the rest are programming languages.
Ferns aren't trees; the rest are.
The trumpet is brass; the rest are strings.
Quartz is a mineral, not a metal.
Baikal is a lake; the rest are rivers.
Dolphins are mammals; the rest are fish.
A sphere is 3D; the rest are 2D shapes.
The femur is a bone; the rest are organs.
A fresco is a painting; the rest are poems.
An ounce is a unit of weight, not a currency.
Helium is a gas at room temperature; the others are (near-)liquid metals.
Sushi is food; the rest are dances.
The Sahara is a desert; the rest are mountains.
Bats are mammals; the rest are birds.
Nylon is synthetic; the rest are natural fibers.
Poker has hidden information and chance; the rest are perfect-information board games.
Picasso was a painter; the rest were composers.
Nepal is landlocked; the rest are islands.
The radius is in the arm; the rest are leg bones.
An aurora is atmospheric light, not a cloud type.
The kiwi is a bird (from New Zealand); the rest are Australian marsupials.
Arabica is coffee; the rest are wine grapes.
The Caspian is a (salt) lake/sea, not an ocean.
Bronze is an alloy; the rest are elements.
A nebula is a gas cloud, not a small solar-system body.
